name: Flagship.io
description: Flagship.io — Feature flag and A/B testing platform with targeting rules, rollout strategies, and multi-language SDKs.

seo.title: Flagship.io — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Flagship.io: Flagship.io — Feature flag and A/B testing platform with targeting rules, rollout strategies, and multi-language SDKs.

when_to_use: Feature flag rollout with multi-language SDK support
A/B test product hypotheses with targeting rules
Remote config updates without app redeployment
Experimentation platform for product and growth teams

pros: Targeting rules with percentage rollouts and segments
Multi-language SDKs for web, mobile, server
Bucketing algorithm works offline in SDK
A/B testing tied directly to flag variants
cons: AB Tasty acquisition changed focus and pricing
Smaller feature set than LaunchDarkly at enterprise tier
review.verdict: Serviceable feature flag and experimentation tool, but LaunchDarkly and open-source GrowthBook dominate.
review.best_for: Product teams already on AB Tasty wanting integrated feature flags and testing.
review.not_for: Teams seeking best-in-class flag tooling or experimentation stats.
